title: geraniospermum dipetalum
intro: Geraniospermum dipetalum, also known as the lesser periwinkle, is a flowering plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Geraniospermum dipetalum include its ability to reduce anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of depression, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and promote relaxation.
